# backend/tests/test_ai_explain_router.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T06:35:40Z

## Purpose
test_ai_explain_router.py — router-level tests for /api/v1/ai/*.

Scope is intentionally narrow: we don't exercise the RAG pipeline here
(that lives in test_rag_service.py). We only assert the feedback endpoint
accepts valid payloads, rejects invalid ones, and returns 204 No Content
with an empty body.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import pytest
- from `fastapi.testclient` import TestClient
- from `backend.main` import app

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `client()`: (no docstring)
- `test_feedback_positive_returns_204(client)`: (no docstring)
- `test_feedback_negative_minimal_payload_returns_204(client)`: (no docstring)
- `test_feedback_rejects_invalid_rating(client)`: (no docstring)
- `test_feedback_rejects_unknown_field(client)`: (no docstring)

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- 204 No Content — body must be empty.
